data.title: SAIGO launches the "Light Up SAIGO" event, minting Genesis character NFTs for free for a limited time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the SAIGO project is launching a limited-time free casting of the Genesis character NFT event to light up "SAIGO".
It is reported that SAIGO is a project that aggregates multi-chain data services and provides fast transaction functions. Its vision is to become the traffic entrance for on-chain transactions. The project claims that it will be completely driven by community governance, and the token economics will fully follow the "CZ token issuance crazy idea".

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Roenicke denies possibility of recession
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News U.S. Treasury Secretary Howard Lutnick recently refuted the possibility of a recession, saying Trump's tariff policy will drive $1.3 trillion in new investment and unleash U.S. growth potential. However, despite Lutnick's optimism, cryptocurrency traders lack confidence in the market, and Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies have fallen.
Although the resilience of the labor market has temporarily curbed expectations of a recession, the GDPNow model of the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta predicts that GDP growth in the first quarter will be -2.8%, showing signs of slowing growth (CoinDesk)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Dismisses Recession Concerns Amid Tariff Policy Impact
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Howard Lutnick recently dismissed the possibility of an economic recession, asserting that U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policies will drive $1.3 trillion in new investments, unlocking America's growth potential. Despite Lutnick's optimistic outlook, cryptocurrency traders remain skeptical about the market, leading to declines in Bitcoin and other digital currencies. While the resilience of the labor market has temporarily eased recession fears, the GDPNow model from the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta forecasts a first-quarter GDP growth rate of -2.8%, indicating signs of a slowdown.

data.title: Robinhood agrees to pay about $30 million to settle U.S. regulator investigation
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Robinhood online trading platform agreed to pay $29.75 million to resolve the U.S. Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) investigation into its supervision and compliance practices. The settlement amount includes a $26 million fine and $3.75 million in customer compensation.
The investigation found that Robinhood failed to reasonably supervise the clearing system, resulting in transaction delays; failed to identify and report illegal transactions, suspicious fund flows and hackers’ intrusions into customer accounts; in addition, it opened “thousands of accounts” without verifying the identity of customers.
This is the second settlement agreement reached by Robinhood in two months. In the fourth quarter of 2024, Robinhood reported a record net income of $916 million, and cryptocurrency trading revenue increased significantly. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a net outflow of $120 million last week, and Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH had a net inflow of $8.46 million, ranking first
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, last week's trading day (March 3 to March 7, Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs had a net outflow of 120 million US dollars last week.
The Ethereum ETF with the largest weekly net inflow last week was Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH, with a weekly net inflow of 8.46 million US dollars, and the current total net inflow of ETH has reached 614 million US dollars. The second is Bitwise Ethereum ETF ETHW, with a weekly net inflow of 3.96 million US dollars, and the current total net inflow of ETHW has reached 322 million US dollars. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest weekly net outflow last week was Blackrock Ethereum ETF ETHA, with a weekly net outflow of 63.51 million US dollars, and the current total net inflow of ETHA has reached 4.21 billion US dollars. The second is Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETHE, with a weekly net outflow of $52.61 million. Currently, ETHE has a total net outflow of $4.13 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is $7.762 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 2.98%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $2.699 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a net outflow of $799 million last week, with only Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC achieving net inflows
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, last week's trading day (March 3 to March 7, Eastern Time), Bitcoin spot ETFs had a net outflow of 799 million US dollars last week.
Last week, only Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC achieved net inflows, with a weekly net inflow of 35.77 million US dollars, and the current total net inflow of BTC has reached 1.09 billion US dollars. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest weekly net outflow last week was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a weekly net outflow of 201 million US dollars, and the current total net inflow of FBTC has reached 11.56 billion US dollars. The second is Ark & 21Shares Bitcoin ETF ARKB, with a weekly net outflow of 164 million US dollars, and the current total net inflow of ARKB has reached 2.56 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$98.483 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.71%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$36.142 billion.
